selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.

"opinion": "To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is important to be aware of the potential sources of misinformation and take steps to verify the accuracy of the information being shared. This can include fact-checking websites and using trusted news sources. Additionally, setting your social media accounts to only share content from verified sources can help to prevent the spread of fake content. It is also important to be mindful of your own actions on social media, as creating and sharing fake content can have serious consequences. By being informed and vigilant, individuals can play a crucial role in maintaining the integrity of online discourse."
